violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025

Thermometers are lacking in a couple of the refrigeration unit(s). All cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer inside the unit that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2025

Various foods packaged in the food establishment and stored in the grab n go unit are lacking proper labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients (including sub ingredients), the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025
The door to the restroom is not self-closing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2023
Food debris observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024
Refrigerator door gasket of the prep unit observed in poor repair, held in place with tape. Gasket is to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigeration gaskets have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Gaskets are to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2025
The door to the restroom is not self-closing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2023
The floor in a couple of areas in the kitchen area is in poor repair, with missing tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back closet and some areas of the kitchen. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025

The cutting board of the prep unit is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2023
The door to the restroom is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2023
Forks and pasta were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2023
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2023

Pasta and taco meat stored in the 3-door reach-in observed with temperatures between 42 - 43 degrees Fahrenheit. Ambient temperature of the unit observed at 36 degrees F. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Proper cooling methods were reviewed. Covers were removed from the foods and product spread out in order to reach proper temperatures. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2023

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety foods. Pasta and taco meat observed with temperatures of 42 - 43 degrees F. These foods had been placed in the 3-door reach-in unit in covered containers. Covers had been placed on containers prior to temperatures reaching 41 degrees F. Covers were removed and product spread out to allow for cold air circulation in order to reach proper temperatures. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2023

Utensils observed displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2023

The cutting board of the prep unit is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2023
The door to the restroom is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2023
